title_en: Prayer for Good in This World and the Hereafter
arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
latin: Rabbanā ātinā fi ad-dunyā ḥasanatan wa fī al-ākhirati ḥasanatan wa qinā ‘adhāba an-nār.
translation_id: Ya Tuhan kami, berikanlah kami kebaikan di dunia dan kebaikan di akhirat, dan lindungilah kami dari azab api neraka.
translation_en: Our Lord, grant us in this world [that which is] good and in the Hereafter [that which is] good and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
translation_id: Ya Allah, sesungguhnya Engkau Maha Pemaaf dan Engkau mencintai pemaafan, maka maafkanlah aku.
translation_en: O Allah, indeed You are Forgiving, You love forgiveness, so forgive me.

title_id: Doa Nabi Yunus (Mohon Pertolongan dalam Kesulitan)
title_en: Prophet Yunus's Prayer (Seeking Help in Distress)
arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
latin: Lā ilāha illā anta subḥānaka innī kuntu minaẓ-ẓālimīn.
translation_id: Tiada Tuhan selain Engkau. Maha Suci Engkau, sesungguhnya aku termasuk orang-orang yang zalim.
translation_en: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been among the wrongdoers.

title_id: Doa Berlindung dari Kesusahan dan Kesedihan
title_en: Prayer for Refuge from Anxiety and Sorrow
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ
latin: Allāhumma innī a‘ūdhu bika mina al-hammi wa al-ḥazan.
translation_id: Ya Allah, sesungguhnya aku berlindung kepada-Mu dari kesusahan dan kesedihan.
translation_en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow.

title_id: Doa Memohon Ampunan dan Kesejahteraan Dunia Akhirat
title_en: Prayer for Forgiveness and Well-being in This World and the Hereafter
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
latin: Allāhumma innī as’aluka al-‘afwa wa al-‘āfiyah fi ad-dunyā wa al-ākhirah.
translation_id: Ya Allah, sesungguhnya aku memohon kepada-Mu ampunan dan keselamatan di dunia dan di akhirat.
translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for forgiveness and well-being in this world and the Hereafter.

title_id: Doa Sapu Jagat (Kebaikan Dunia dan Akhirat)
title_en: Comprehensive Prayer (Good in This World and Hereafter)
arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
latin: Rabbanā ātinā fid-duniyā ḥasanah, wa fil-ākhirati ḥasanah, wa qinā ‘adhāban-nār.
translation_id: Ya Tuhan kami, berikanlah kami kebaikan di dunia dan kebaikan di akhirat, dan lindungilah kami dari azab neraka.
translation_en: Our Lord, grant us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

translation_id: Dan katakanlah (Muhammad), "Ya Tuhanku, tambahkanlah kepadaku ilmu."
translation_en: And say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge."

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
translation_id: Ya Allah, sesungguhnya Engkau Maha Pemaaf yang menyukai permintaan maaf, maka maafkanlah aku.
translation_en: O Allah, indeed You are a Grantor of forgiveness, You love to forgive, so forgive me.

translation_id: Cukuplah Allah (menjadi penolong) bagi kami dan Dia sebaik-baik pelindung.
translation_en: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best Disposer of affairs.

title_id: Doa Memohon Petunjuk, Ketakwaan, Kehormatan, dan Kecukupan
title_en: Prayer for Guidance, Piety, Chastity, and Contentment
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى وَالْعَفَافَ وَالْغِنَى
latin: Allāhumma innī as’alukal-hudā wat-tuqā wal-‘afāfa wal-ghinā.
translation_id: Ya Allah, sesungguhnya aku memohon kepada-Mu petunjuk, ketakwaan, kehormatan (kesucian diri), dan kecukupan (kekayaan jiwa).
translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity (purity), and contentment (self-sufficiency).
